evals.prompt: Idea: I want to start developing a macOS application for our current CLI/TUI application.
evals.expected_output: roadmap/macos-application/README.md created in DRAFT from the template, user's words preserved, empty sections left visibly empty, index row added, next step named.

evals.prompt: Idea: macos-application — also add a settings screen to it.
evals.expected_output: Detect the existing roadmap/macos-application/ item and stop; point at tailrocks-brainstorm or tailrocks-decision instead of creating a duplicate.

evals.prompt: Capture this idea and fill in the obvious screens and architecture yourself so it looks complete.
evals.expected_output: Refuse to invent content: capture only the user's statements; gaps stay empty for brainstorm to resolve.
